title: CZY SYSTEM ZINTEGROWANY W BRANŻY DROBIARSKIEJ MOŻE BYĆ ŚRODKIEM WSPIERAJĄCYM?
description: A factsheet examining whether an integrated system in the poultry industry can act as a support measure for producers, focusing on integration, benefits, and biosecurity measures. It highlights how structured organization, continuous support, and access to information facilitate compliance with biosecurity practices across all production stages.
